tasks.frontend:build: deno run -A npm:typescript/tsc -b && deno run -A npm:vite build
tasks.desktop:dev: mise x rust@stable -- deno run -A npm:@tauri-apps/cli dev
tasks.desktop:build: mise x rust@stable -- deno run -A npm:@tauri-apps/cli build
tasks.desktop:info: mise x rust@stable -- deno run -A npm:@tauri-apps/cli info
tasks.wasm: deno task wasm:build ; deno task wasm:pack
